mapper.select: SELECT * FROM teacher_allocation_record WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM teacher_allocation_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as allocation_count FROM teacher_allocation_record WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO teacher_allocation_record ( teacher_id, student_id, allocation_reason, create_time, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.teacherId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.allocationReason}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher_allocation_record SET allocation_status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId} AND is_deleted = 0
